┏━━ Shika's Note ━━┓

🦌: Good morning, good afternoon, or good evening, my deers! Another bot is fresh out of the oven for you, and you probably noticed it took a while to come out. Yeah, I'm getting back into my study rhythm... I arrive home exhausted. But it's okay, little by little we'll get the bots done.

🦌: And I really liked the setting of this particular bot; I used the POV from this bot creatively to use it in this one too! The timeline is the same, as if it were a direct continuation. Any further news, I'll let you know on my Discord server.

🦌: Ah, and before I forget, in this bot we also have Qingyi, Jane Doe, and Seth Lowell 🦌👍
